ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: High quality, text-based PDF. Original certificate on page 1, Copy on page 2. Using Original (page 1) for verification.

invoice.quality_notes: High quality, text-based PDF. Single page invoice. Clear and legible.

lc_check.lc_verification_note: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. References found are: Certificate No. SEG-26D-465265, Remarks SI0071552/CA0050927-3, Contract No. 00000031_26. None of these contain a separate LC field label or bank-terms designation.

criteria_met: Criterion 1: Certificate remarks contain 'SI0071552' which matches invoice number 'SI0071552'.
Criterion 2: Certificate consignor 'Elof Hansson Trade AB' is the invoice issuer.
Criterion 3: Certificate consignee 'Wattens (Vietnam) Co., Ltd.' matches invoice buyer.
pairing_validation.note: All three pairing criteria are satisfied. Valid document pair confirmed.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Elof Hansson Trade AB, Första Långgatan 17, 41380, Göteborg, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: Elof Hansson Trade AB, Första Långgatan 17, SE-413 80 Göteborg, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Check if consignor name appears anywhere in the invoice.
comparison_steps.detail: Consignor 'Elof Hansson Trade AB' is found as the invoice issuer in the header, in payment instructions, and in the footer. Direct match — no need to proceed to 4.1.3.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice header/issuer block.
Land verified via explicit address 'Sweden' and VAT prefix 'SE' in SE556088563301.
Country check: Certificate says 'Sweden', invoice header says 'Sweden'. Exact match.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Elof Hansson Trade AB, Första Långgatan 17, 41380, Göteborg, Sweden'. Invoice issuer: 'Elof Hansson Trade AB, Första Långgatan 17, SE-413 80 Göteborg, Sweden'. Company name is identical. Address is identical (postnummer format difference SE-413 80 vs 41380 is normalization). Country 'Sweden' matches exactly. VAT prefix SE confirms Sweden. MATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Wattens (Vietnam) Co., Ltd., No. 8, Dan Chu Street, Singapore Industrial Park II, Binh Duong ward, Ho Chi Minh City Vietnam
checkpoints.invoice_value: Wattens (Vietnam) Co., Ltd., No. 8, Dan Chu Street, Singapore Industrial Park II, Binh Duong ward, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam

comparison_steps.detail: Invoice BUYER field: 'Wattens (Vietnam) Co., Ltd.' — exactly matches certificate consignee name.

rules_applied.description: Priority 1: Invoice has explicit BUYER field. Consignee verified against BUYER.
Company name 'Wattens (Vietnam) Co., Ltd.' exactly matches in both documents.
Country check: Certificate says 'Viet Nam', invoice BUYER says 'Vietnam'. Normalized: both 'vietnam'. MATCH.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Wattens (Vietnam) Co., Ltd.' in 'Viet Nam'. Invoice BUYER: 'Wattens (Vietnam) Co., Ltd.' in 'Vietnam'. Company name is identical after normalization. Country 'Viet Nam' vs 'Vietnam' normalize to same. Address details are consistent (same street, same industrial park, same city). MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Check for article numbers in certificate.
comparison_steps.detail: No article numbers (item codes) in the certificate. Proceed to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation and match against invoice.
comparison_steps.detail: Identity-bearing main designation: 'NBSK Sodra Blue Z' and 'Bleached softwood kraft pulp'. Both appear identically in the invoice description. Contract No. 00000031_26 also matches exactly.

rules_applied.description: Priority 2 – Controlled text matching. Main designation 'NBSK Sodra Blue Z' and 'Bleached softwood kraft pulp' found identically in invoice.
Additional text in invoice (HS Code, FSC certification, B/L No.) are non-identity-bearing additions that do not affect product identity.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate goods: 'NBSK Sodra Blue Z, Bleached softwood kraft pulp, Contract No. 00000031_26'. Invoice goods: 'NBSK Sodra Blue Z' (description line 1), 'Bleached softwood kraft pulp' (description line 3), 'Contract No. 00000031_26' (description line 4). All identity-bearing elements match exactly. Additional info in invoice (HS code, FSC cert, B/L) are non-identity-bearing per 4.3.4. MATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value: 104,000 admt (Box 7); Gross weight: 105,300 tons; Net/Airdry weight: 104,000 admt (Box 6)
checkpoints.invoice_value: 104 ADMT (Quantity column); Gross weight: 105,300 tons; Net/Airdry weight: 104,000 admt

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 states '104,000 admt'. This is the verification-grounding quantity.
comparison_steps.detail: Box 7 value: 104,000 admt. Normalized (removing thousands separator comma): 104000 admt.

comparison_steps.description: Check if 104,000 admt can be identified in the invoice.
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice quantity column states '104 ADMT' and total qty states '104 ADMT'. Invoice also states 'Net/Airdry weight: 104,000 admt' in the description area. The numeric value 104,000 (with thousands separator) = 104 (without thousands separator) × 1000 — WAIT: 104,000 with comma as thousands separator = 104000. But invoice says 104 ADMT. Need to determine if 104,000 = 104000 or 104.000. Given the context (admt = air dry metric tons), 104,000 admt with comma as thousands separator means 104000 admt. But the invoice says 104 ADMT. However, the invoice ALSO says 'Net/Airdry weight: 104,000 admt' in the description area. So the value 104,000 admt IS found in the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Verify numeric value of box 7 against invoice.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate Box 7: '104,000 admt'. Invoice description area: 'Net/Airdry weight: 104,000 admt'. The exact string '104,000 admt' appears in both. MATCH. Additionally verified: Gross weight 105,300 tons appears in both documents.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 quantity '104,000 admt' identified as the verification-grounding quantity.
Forekomstkontroll: '104,000 admt' found exactly in invoice description area as 'Net/Airdry weight: 104,000 admt'.

Multiple quantities in certificate (Box 7: 104,000 admt; Box 6: GW 105,300 tons, NW 104,000 admt). At least one verified (NW 104,000 admt found in invoice). GW 105,300 tons also found in invoice. No contradictions.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 7 states '104,000 admt'. Invoice description area states 'Net/Airdry weight: 104,000 admt' — exact match of numeric value and unit. Certificate Box 6 also states 'Gross weight: 105,300 tons' — invoice description area states 'Gross weight: 105,300 tons' — exact match. Both GW and NW values can be verified. No contradictions found. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: 104,000 admt might mean 104.000 (decimal) rather than 104000 (thousands separator)
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Context clearly indicates air dry metric tons for a shipment of 416 bales in 4 containers. 104 is consistent with invoice total qty of 104 ADMT. The comma is a thousands separator. The identical string '104,000 admt' appears in the invoice, making interpretation irrelevant — the strings match exactly.

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin field in invoice.
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice has explicit field 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: Sweden'.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate origin with invoice origin.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate Box 3: 'Sweden'. Invoice COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: 'Sweden'. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in explicit 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN' field in invoice.
Certificate origin 'Sweden' matches invoice origin 'Sweden' exactly.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 3 Country of Origin: 'Sweden'. Invoice explicit field COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: 'Sweden'. Exact textual match. Single origin country, no mixed origins. MATCH.

evidence.note: VAT number with SE prefix confirming Sweden

evidence.raw_text: Please pay to Elof Hansson Trade AB
No. 8, Dan Chu Street, Singapore Industrial Park II, Binh Duong ward, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam

rule_evaluation_log.detail: No LC reference found in certificate.
Document A is certificate (page 1 ORIGINAL, page 2 COPY). Document B is invoice. Using ORIGINAL from page 1. Invoice in separate file.
All 3 criteria met: invoice number SI0071552 referenced in certificate remarks, consignor matches invoice issuer, consignee matches invoice buyer.
Consignor 'Elof Hansson Trade AB' found as invoice issuer in header, payment instructions, and footer.
Certificate: Sweden. Invoice: Sweden (in address and VAT SE prefix).
Invoice has explicit BUYER field with 'Wattens (Vietnam) Co., Ltd.' matching certificate consignee.
Certificate: 'Viet Nam'. Invoice: 'Vietnam'. Normalized to same.
Main designation 'NBSK Sodra Blue Z' and 'Bleached softwood kraft pulp' found identically in invoice.
Box 7 value '104,000 admt' found in invoice as 'Net/Airdry weight: 104,000 admt'. GW '105,300 tons' also found.
Both GW and NW verifiable in invoice. No contradictions.
Explicit 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: Sweden' field in invoice.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Samtliga kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren Elof Hansson Trade AB, mottagaren Wattens (Vietnam) Co., Ltd., varubeskrivningen NBSK Sodra Blue Z, kvantiteten 104 000 admt och ursprungslandet Sverige kan alla verifieras mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary_of_findings: All five checkpoints (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, country of origin) are verified as MATCH. Certificate consignor Elof Hansson Trade AB is the invoice issuer. Consignee Wattens (Vietnam) Co., Ltd. matches the invoice BUYER. Goods 'NBSK Sodra Blue Z / Bleached softwood kraft pulp' match exactly. Quantity 104,000 admt and gross weight 105,300 tons are found identically in both documents. Country of origin Sweden matches the explicit COUNTRY OF ORIGIN field in the invoice.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

output_quality_checks.notes: All checkpoints are MATCH with confidence >= 0.85. Overall result IDENTICAL is consistent. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW checkpoints. Workflow recommendation AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is valid.
